response.justification: While Szabo brings 27 years of strong software engineering experience and current staff-level infrastructure work including AI-agent systems, the role requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume shows recent involvement in AI infrastructure but no evidence of shipped AI products, deep ML knowledge, or the strategic AI leadership a director-level AI Strategy position demands. The lack of advanced AI credentials further compounds this gap.
strengths: 27 years of full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure with demonstrated polyglot capabilities and builder mentality
Current Staff Engineer at re:cinq contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing platform-thinking and strategic engineering mindset
Proven ability to architect, build, and ship complex systems from ground up (GISCollective, multiple companies) with both design and technical execution fluency
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI products or platforms—recent AI exposure is infrastructure-focused rather than establishing domain authority
Lacks preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; education consists only of BS degrees in Computer Science and Photography/Video
Career trajectory primarily in direct software engineering rather than strategic technical leadership roles advising customers on AI adoption and cloud architecture
